name: Sunny Biscuit
description: Sunny Biscuit is a honey-gold plush art doll with 9 hand-articulated joints. Her golden coat and bright eyes radiate warmth, and her posable limbs let her sit, wave, or strike an adventurous pose. Each one is hand-finished in our Yiwu atelier — joint tension individually adjusted, features hand-embroidered. She arrives in a hand-packed adoption box with her first outfit, branded collar, and numbered certificate.
story_preview: On a spring morning in the dandelion fields, a tiny golden pup opened her eyes. A breeze carried dandelion seeds through the air, and one landed right on her nose. She sneezed — and the wind carried joy across the valley. She's been waiting for her person ever since...
quirk: Hides biscuits under your pillow for midnight snacks
skill: Whistles a secret tune taught by a bluebird
handcraft_note: Hand-assembled and finished in our Yiwu studio. Joint tension individually adjusted.

name: Coco Cloud
description: Coco Cloud is impossibly soft — a vanilla-cream plush art doll with cascading hand-textured curls. Her 9 posable joints let her curl up into the perfect cuddle shape. Her textured curls are shaped by hand — no two Coco Clouds have the same curl pattern.
story_preview: The softest cloud in the sky looked down one day and thought: 'I want to be something that makes people feel warm.' So it floated down, shaped itself into a tiny curly puppy, and fell gently asleep. Now it wakes up only when someone who needs comfort is near...
quirk: Falls asleep mid-play and dreams of the sky
skill: Knowing exactly when you need a cuddle
handcraft_note: Signature curly coat achieved through hand-texturing. No two Coco Clouds have the same curl pattern.

name: Lucky Mochi
description: Lucky Mochi has the softest floppy ears and the gentlest chocolate-brown eyes. Hand-assembled with 9 articulated joints and finished with embroidered paw pads — this quiet companion is for those who appreciate the beauty of stillness. Scan his code to learn why his ears wiggle when he's happy.
features: Floppy ears with internal wire for posing
story_preview: Early one morning, the owner of a tiny mochi shop opened his door and found a chocolate-brown puppy fast asleep in the fresh batch of mochi. He hadn't eaten a single one. He'd just curled up in the warm, sweet-smelling rice dough and drifted off...
quirk: Ears wiggle involuntarily when he's truly happy
skill: Finding the warmest, coziest spot in any room
handcraft_note: Floppy ears contain thin flexible wire core, hand-inserted. Each ear takes 12 minutes of hand-finishing.

name: Sugar Puff
description: Sugar Puff is our princess — a cream-white plush art doll with blush-pink cheeks and the most luxurious hand-textured coat in our collection. Her 9 posable joints and deluxe kit make her our premium piece. Her blush-pink cheeks are applied by hand in a 3-stage process that takes over 40 minutes per piece.
story_preview: Sugar Puff was born on a cloud made of spun sugar and pink cotton candy, high above a carnival. She floated down, landed in a little girl's cupped hands, and immediately demanded to be adored. She has expected the same reaction from everyone ever since...
quirk: Demands exactly one belly rub per hour (she counts)
skill: Making everyone within 5 meters fall in love with her
handcraft_note: 3-stage hand-texturing process: base curl, blush gradient, final finish. Over 40 minutes of handwork per piece.

name: Tofu Blossom
description: Tofu Blossom has a smile that could end wars. Pure cloud-white with the iconic upturned mouth that took our artisans 3 prototypes to perfect. This happy little soul radiates joy from every posable joint. Her smile took our artisans 3 prototypes to perfect — it is hand-embroidered, not machine-made.
story_preview: In a garden at the edge of the world, one morning every flower turned in the same direction — toward a tiny white puppy sitting among the peonies. She was smiling. A real, genuine, heart-melting smile. The flowers have followed her ever since...
quirk: Smiles in her sleep (we've checked — it's real)
skill: Dissolving bad days just by being nearby
handcraft_note: Iconic smile is hand-embroidered, not machine. 3 pattern iterations before artisans were satisfied. Each smile slightly different.

name: Daisy Mochi
description: Daisy Mochi has the iconic long body and short legs of a corgi, reimagined as a hand-finished plush art doll. Her proportions were carefully engineered to capture corgi charm without sacrificing posability. She waddles instead of walks and has never taken a bad photo.
story_preview: In a bakery on a cobblestone street, a tiny puppy was born behind the counter. Her legs were too short to see over it. So she learned to communicate through her ears — one up meant 'curious,' both up meant 'I heard the treat jar.' The baker named her Daisy...
quirk: Waddles when she walks — running is out of the question
skill: Communicating entire sentences through ear movements alone
handcraft_note: Unusual proportions required custom joint spacing. Oversized ears individually shaped and stiffened by hand for expressive posing.

name: Marshmallow Dream
description: Marshmallow Dream is our rarest creation — only 500 will ever be made. Each features a white-to-pink gradient coat and a hand-set iridescent horn. She glows faintly under moonlight. If you're lucky enough to adopt one, each one features a hand-set iridescent horn and a proprietary gradient dye coat — a 6-hour process per piece.
story_preview: Some say Marshmallow Dream was born from a shooting star that fell into warm milk. Others say she appeared one night in our studio, already wearing her tiny horn. All we know: only 500 exist, each glows under moonlight, and 100% of owners report being happier.
quirk: Glows faintly under moonlight (we've stopped trying to explain it)
handcraft_note: Pinnacle of studio craftsmanship. 6-hour gradient dye bath. 25-minute horn-setting. 500 pieces only. Ever.

name: Outfit 01
description: Classic sailor-style outfit for your Mochidog. Striped top, navy shorts, and matching hat. Hand-sewn in small batches.

name: Outfit 02
description: A miniature hoodie with real drawstring and front pocket. Cream or grey. Your Mochidog's go-to comfort piece.

name: Outfit 03
description: Tulle skirt layered by hand, satin bow, and matching headband. Pink or lavender. For when your Mochidog needs to make an entrance.

name: Outfit 04
description: Rugged khaki vest with real pockets, matching bandana, and a tiny brass compass charm. For the Mochidog who needs to discover something.

name: Outfit 05
description: Star-print cotton pajamas with matching sleep mask. Because even plush dogs need a good night's sleep.

name: Outfit 06
description: Cozy knit sweater with rainbow stripe pattern. Bright, cheerful, and perfect for cool days.

name: Outfit 07
description: Tiny denim jacket with real metal buttons. Cool, classic, never goes out of style.

name: Outfit 08
description: Sweet school uniform set: pleated skirt, collared shirt, and ribbon tie. Your Mochidog is ready for class.

name: Outfit 09
description: Super soft fleece onesie with bear ears on the hood. The ultimate cozy outfit for lazy days.

name: Outfit 10
description: Sweet cherry-print dress with puffed sleeves and a matching hair bow. Perfect for sunny days and garden parties.
